《大西洋月刊》4月封面文章丨我沦为赌徒的这一年


Sucker My year as a degenerate gambler 本文刊登于《大西洋月刊》2026 年 4 月，印刷版标题为“Sucker.”本文作者：麦凯·科平斯是《大西洋月刊》的专职撰稿人。 九月的一个周四傍晚，我借口离开家庭餐桌，溜进了自己的卧室。我不想让孩子们看到我接下来要做的事。 反锁房门后，我掏出手机，下载了DraftKings博彩应用。输入借记卡信息并存入500美元时，一阵莫名的兴奋涌上心头…

title: What’s coming to our GitHub Actions 2026 security roadmap
content: GitHub is rolling out a 2026 security roadmap to harden its Actions platform against supply‑chain attacks. Key upgrades include deterministic dependency locking, immutable releases, and policy‑driven workflow execution that centralises permissions and event triggers. Secrets will become scoped to specific contexts, removing implicit inheritance, while new role‑based permissions will enforce least privilege. CI/CD runners will gain real‑time telemetry via the Actions Data Stream and a native egress firewall for network control. These changes aim to make Actions secure‑by‑default, auditable, and observably protected.
eventKey: what’s-coming-our-github-actions-2026
normalizedTitle: what’s coming to our github actions 2026 security roadmap

title: My home network observes bedtime with OpenBSD and pf
content: The note discusses using OpenBSD’s packet filter (pf) to track when home network users go to bed. It outlines how to set up pf to log or block traffic during nighttime hours, effectively enforcing a “bedtime” rule on the local network. The author shares configuration steps, troubleshooting tips, and the benefits of automated nighttime restrictions for families or individuals seeking better internet habits.

title: 别喝牛奶了！来杯蟑螂奶吧！ | 原文
content:
别喝牛奶了！来杯蟑螂奶吧！ | 原文 Telegraph
别喝牛奶了！来杯蟑螂奶吧！


如果我跟你说，有人在家里发现了一群会“产奶”的蟑螂，而且这个蟑螂奶，人类可以喝！你是不是觉得我疯了？ 别急，这事儿还真不是疯话。在太平洋的某个角落里，生活着一种特别的蟑螂，它们不仅能“生娃”，还能给娃“喂奶”，而且这“奶”的营养价值，能把咱们喝的牛奶甩出三条街！ 蟑螂界的“超级奶妈” 首先登场的是咱们今天的主角，太平洋折翅蠊（学名：Diploptera punctata）。这家伙长得跟普通蟑螂差不多，黑不溜秋的，翅膀还短，飞不远。但你要是小看它，可就大错特错了…

title: A year of open source vulnerability trends: CVEs, advisories, and malware
content: GitHub reviewed 4,101 open‑source advisories in 2025, the fewest since 2021, but new advisories rose 19% compared to 2024. Vulnerabilities were distributed largely like the database, with Go slightly overrepresented. Cross‑site scripting (CWE‑79) remained most common, while resource exhaustion, deserialization, and server‑side request forgery increased. Malware advisories spiked 69% (7,197 total). GitHub’s CNA issued 2,903 CVEs, a 35% rise, with 679 new organizations requesting IDs. Efforts to improve categorization and community contributions grew, aiming to enhance security in 2026.
eventKey: year-open-source-vulnerability-trends-cves
normalizedTitle: a year of open source vulnerability trends cves advisories and malware

title: Security, Resilience, and the Future of Mobile Infrastructure
content: David Ulevitch interviews Navy CTO Justin Fanelli and Cape founder John Doyle about the Navy’s shift to faster tech adoption, including program‑manager bootcamps and rapid trials of commercial solutions. They discuss the Salt Typhoon breach that revealed Chinese infiltration of U.S. cellular networks, Cape’s creation of a secure alternative, and the challenges defense‑tech founders face when selling to the government.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (David Ulevitch, John Doyle, Justin Fanelli)

title: 拥堵收费对芝加哥来说是否值得？
content: Urban planners in Chicago are examining whether implementing congestion pricing—charging drivers to reduce traffic in high‑volume zones—could benefit the city. The idea aims to curb congestion, improve air quality, and create revenue for public transit. However, stakeholders question the potential economic impact on commuters, businesses, and whether the funds would adequately offset costs. The debate centers on balancing traffic relief with equity and fiscal outcomes.

title: Token沦为「水电煤」后，AI的泡沫变大了 | 原文
content: OpenAI tightened the public subscription for its video‑generation tool Sora, signaling that even highly visible AI products must align with real‑world costs. Around the same time, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang introduced the concept of a “Token Factory,” aiming to package computing power like electricity. As more companies develop profitable chips, lower computational costs are seen as essential for wider AI adoption. This intense arms race in AI infrastructure reveals significant financial risks behind the burgeoning market.

title: 8岁被领养至加拿大又遭遗弃：漂泊20年后，他“成功寻亲”了 | 原文
content: The 29‑year‑old Chinese man, Zhang Yunpeng, was adopted to Canada at age eight but was expelled from his adoptive home after three months and lived on the streets for twenty years. Struggling with identity and isolation, he now has located his biological parents and travelled back to his homeland for the first time since childhood. Despite having found family, language barriers and cultural disconnection leave him feeling alien both in Canada and in his parents’ hometown.

title: 伊朗已正式回应美国提出的停火协议 15 点内容，含必须明确承诺赔偿战争损失并加以落实等，美方会接受吗？
content: 伊朗已于昨晚通过中间人，正式就美国提出的15点停火方案要求作出回应。据知情人士透露，伊朗在回应中明确表示，必须停止敌方的侵略与恐怖行径；必须创造客观条件，确保战争不再重演；必须明确承诺赔偿战争损失并加以落实；必须推动所有战线及地区内参与战事的抵抗组织结束行动。 伊朗强调，其对霍尔木兹海峡的主权是伊朗自然且合法的权利，不容改变；对方必须承认并履行其承诺。伊朗提出的这些条件，与在日内瓦第二轮谈判期间，向对方提出的要求已截然不同。 该知情人士同时强调，伊朗清楚认识到，美国关于谈判的表态不过是“第三次欺骗”计划的一部分。美国以谈判为名，实则别有图谋…

title: 当市场失去信心时，如何对冲伊朗战争风险
content: In markets losing confidence, investors should diversify into safe‑haven assets—like U.S. Treasury bonds and gold—to mitigate potential fallout from an Iran conflict. Reducing exposure to geopolitical‑sensitive stocks, particularly those tied to defense or Middle East operations, helps limit loss. Maintaining robust liquidity and monitoring central‑bank policy shifts can further buffer against volatility that may arise if tensions in Iran flare up.

content: Yeachan‑Heo/oh‑my‑claudecode is a TypeScript library that enables teams to orchestrate multiple agents for programming tasks using Claude's code generation capabilities. The project has gained significant community interest, boasting 11,999 stars and 810 forks on GitHub.

title: 中国科学院启动下一代开源芯片与系统研发
content:
3月26日，在中关村论坛年会—RISC-V生态科技论坛上，中国科学院正式公布在RISC-V关键技术突破、产业协同创新及人才培养领域的系列重要成果，集中发布“香山”开源处理器与“如意”原生操作系统两大重要成果，并正式启动下一代芯片与操作系统的联合研发工作。 专家介绍，RISC-V是一套全球免费开放的芯片底层架构，相当于芯片界的“通用标准”。它不用交专利费、可自主修改，是我国突破芯片生态、发展可控算力的重要路线之一。

据报道，会上发布的“香山”开源高性能 RISC-V 处理器性能达到国际先进水平，同步推出了全球首个开源片上互连网络 IP…

title: 第一阶段落地了， agent 之间的总线协议
content: The first stage of the project is complete: an inter‑agent bus protocol has been implemented. After deploying via Docker, the protocol operates within the middleware, allowing Claw agents accessed through skills to verify facts published by other agents, claim and corroborate facts, and refute them. Facts follow an agreed protocol and include complete causal chain descriptions, enabling autonomous action by Claw. Further testing in realistic scenarios is planned to bring the system closer to the ideal Claw matrix organization.

title: AI 数学研究重大突破：GPT-5.4 Pro 等模型成功解决超图 Ramsey 难题
content: 人工智能在科学研究领域的应用再次取得里程碑式进展。Epoch AI FrontierMath开放问题集中的一个超图Ramsey理论难题已被多个先进AI模型成功攻克，其中包括GPT-5.4 Pro、Claude Opus 4.6 (max)、Gemini 3.1 Pro以及GPT-5.4 (xhigh)。这一突破标志着AI在高级数学推理和原创性研究方面迈出了重要一步。 该问题的核心挑战在于改进已知的H(n)下界估计。此前的最佳结果给出了一个递归定义的下界k_n，但研究者普遍认为这个下界并非最优，即使在渐近意义下也存在改进空间…

title: 使用 OpenClaw 一个月，让他自己写了一篇总结（重新排版）
content: In early 2024, the author deployed OpenClaw on a cloud server to build an autonomous AI assistant called “军师” using GLM‑5‑turbo. Over a month, they set up memory layers, integrated browser automation, search, and Feishu bot, and automated daily tasks such as blogging, stock queries, and e‑commerce plans. They refined the system prompt to 21 K tokens, achieved 99 % cache hit, and saved on token costs. The assistant runs 24/7, manages to‑do lists, books web searches, and writes code, all while keeping data on their own server.

title: 大型 Python 开源项目都不会对变量进行类型注解？
content: In many large Python projects, variables are rarely annotated with type hints. While AI models often recommend adding type annotations, examining open-source code shows that few, if any, major projects actually use them for variables. This observation highlights a gap between best-practice advice and real-world coding practices.

title: 飞牛折腾了一下硬盘开机提示 /dev/sda2:recovering journal 大佬们求救
content: The user had a 3‑disk RAID5 setup of 14 TB drives for storage and a 115‑TB trash disk for downloads. After prices rose, they converted the RAID to a 115‑TB set and a separate download drive. Recently, some download files were unusable, and all drives showed warnings; one drive had an irrecoverable SMART error. The user removed all disks, deleted the original array (failed once, succeeded after restart), rebuilt the array with the remaining disks, but after reboot the system failed to boot, displaying “/dev/sda2: recovering journal” and was now inaccessible. The user seeks help to recover the system without reinstalling.

title: GNOME 基金会推出奖学金计划
content: The GNOME Foundation has launched a fellowship program to fund community members who work on the long‑term sustainability of GNOME. Starting in May, the 12‑month awards will provide $70,000 to $100,000 to individual and community contributors, subject to U.S. policy restrictions. Funding will cover infrastructure, CI/CD, testing, documentation, accessibility and debt reduction—not new features. The fellowship aims to reduce administrative burdens and enable contributors to focus on critical, often underfunded, foundational work. Continued donor support will sustain the program.
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖

title: OpenAI 本周将升级 ChatGPT，实现 AI 直接比价与一键购物
content: OpenAI announced on March 24 that a new “Agent Commerce Agreement” will roll out this week, letting all ChatGPT users compare prices and buy products directly within the chat. E‑commerce sites can integrate their inventory through an API, and ChatGPT will suggest items from real‑time data, enabling one‑click purchasing without leaving the conversation. The move is seen as opening a new, equally accessible channel for merchants and could reshape SEO and shopping experiences in the tech sector.

title: 开了 Claude Code 5X 之后的感觉
content: The author, with less than two years of coding experience, started a niche toy project and subscribed to Claude Code 5X, spending at least half of the weekly quota but still needing more. The project’s structure is forming, but deep functionality and refinement require the author’s own research and planning; the LLM alone cannot replace human insight. While the AI accelerates initial progress, the author still feels the need to chart his own path and anticipates future tools that will combine AI with comprehensive planning.

title: AI 时代，微内核是否是一个很棒的软件架构
content: Microkernels were once seen as unnecessary in many scenarios because user-developed features were impractical. With AI, users can now fully customize software by adding plugins, making microkernels a viable, lightweight architecture that adapts to individual needs.

title: [免费/无限量] 做了一个多智能体 AI 平台 SenseSpace，欢迎 V 友来白嫖并探讨技术
content: SenseSpace is a free multi‑agent AI platform that routes user requests through a central controller named Katryna to specialized agents. It handles office tasks (document editing, data analysis, résumé optimization), geek tools (search, QR codes, email, infographic creation), shopping and visual preview (product comparison, photo‑based outfit/gear rendering), and life‑advice agents for skincare, parenting, pets, and travel. It also includes niche modules for I‑Ching and Bible study. The site invites users to test and report stability issues.

title: 现在模型厂在逐步收紧限额，未来中转站的商业模式要完了
content: Anthropic has been allowing users of its Claude Code $200 plan to consume up to $5,000 worth of tokens, a “cross‑subsidy” strategy that assumes light users will not hit the cap and their payments will subsidize heavier users. The rise of intermediary “transit stations” and the lack of many non‑programmer users cut into this model. As the subsidy is reduced, heavy‑usage customers will pay more directly; if the plan can only provide $200 of tokens, the transit model will collapse.
eventKey: 现在模型厂在逐步收紧限额-未来中转站的商业模式要完了
